creator: sterum77@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 201512
Patch for deskutils/kdeconnect-kde

In kdeconnect-kde file browsing is realized with sshfs, but this seems not possible in FreeBSD because the command line option -o password_stdin from sshfs does not work. So i tried using sshfs with the program security/sshpass an this works for me but probably using  sshpass in this way is a security risk.
I have created and attached a patch for the port. Please have a look at it.
